name: Recorded Future Sandbox
description: App for Recorded Future Sandbox submissions

actions.name: Detonate File
actions.description: Run the file in the sandbox and retrieve the analysis results

parameters.name: vault_id
parameters.description: Vault ID of file to detonate

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: Optional password if file is protected

parameters.name: profile_id
parameters.description: The profile to use (standard if left empty)

parameters.name: user_tags
parameters.description: Optional array of user-defined strings to mark sample, please separate pairs by commas (e.g. source:smtp,type:exe)

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Optional, specify the timeout of analysis

actions.name: Fetch Report
actions.description: Fetch a Recorded Future Sandbox analysis report based on ID value

parameters.name: analysis_id
parameters.description: ID given by Recorded Future Sandbox for the analysis to query

actions.name: Detonate Url
actions.description: Run a url in the sandbox and retrieve the analysis results

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: The kind of URL analysis to run, you can choose between 'url' and 'fetch'. Url launches the url in the sandbox. Fetch lets Recorded Future Sandbox download what's located at the URL and submit it as a file

parameters.name: profile_id
parameters.description: The profile to use (standard if left empty)

parameters.name: user_tags
parameters.description: Optional array of user-defined strings to mark sample, please separate pairs by commas (e.g. source:smtp,type:exe)

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Optional, specify the timeout of analysis

actions.name: Get Status
actions.description: Get the current status of a Recorded Future Sandbox analysis

parameters.name: analysis_id
parameters.description: ID given by Recorded Future Sandbox for the analysis to query
